posts.body: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 10 of 10 Pending | Tied for 1st with 26 others Moutinho vs. RuizZebenzui Ruiz, TKO, R2Moutinho is a jobber. Idc that this is a “hometown” fight and that he’s on regionals, he is simply just a bad fighter. The only thing he has is his chin. Idk Ruiz that well but I will never pick this jobber MoutinhoAmato vs. FioreNick Fiore, SUB, R1So random seeing Fiore here. He got a massive upset back in CTFC and now hes getting a layup in Portugal. Fiore is still a bad fighter but I think he got to the ufc way too early. He also got some awful matchups to boot. His wrestling is bad and he lacks physicality but he’s got great bjj. I hope he gets another ufc shot or at least a pfl opportunity, he’s earned it
